intro: Glochidion leptogynum, also known as the Australian Quandong or Australian Ironwood, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae, native to Australia and New Guinea. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which may help to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, skin conditions, and infections.
